name: Copper and PEX Pipe Calculator
seo_description: Calculate copper and PEX pipe lengths, elbows, tees and valves. Free plumbing calculator.
example_label: Calculate copper/PEX pipe for a water installation with 40m length and 6 supply points.

range_hints.longitud: Total length of pipe for hot/cold water
range_hints.puntos_suministro: Faucets, showers, toilets, washing machines, etc.

result_context: For {length}m pipe with {puntos_suministro} points: {length_merma_m}m total with waste, {codos_ud} elbows, {tee_ud} tees, {llaves_escuadra} valves, {rollos_50m} PEX rolls.
formula_display: Total length = Length x 1.10 (waste); Fittings = Points x 3
steps: Estimate fittings: 6 points x 3 = 18 fittings (valves, elbows, tees)
Size diameters: 1/2" for faucets, 3/4" for showers, 1" for mains
mistakes: Not insulating hot water pipes (energy loss)
Using insufficient diameter (low pressure at distant points)
Not installing isolation valves per sector for maintenance
description: Calculate copper and PEX pipe lengths, elbows, tees and valves. Free plumbing calculator.
